text:
Factor
Quarterly
Fama-French Quality + Value
Quality filters + low P/B rank; Fama-French / Asness lineage.

Momentum
Monthly
Momentum (12-1 month)
Classic price momentum skipping last month (Jegadeesh & Titman).

Factor
Monthly
Low Volatility
Low realized vol wins on risk-adjusted basis (Baker et al.).

Value
Annual
Magic Formula
Earnings yield + ROE quality; excludes many financials.

Macro
Monthly
Dual Momentum
SPY vs EFA vs SHY tactical rotation (Antonacci).

Income
Annual
Dogs of the Dow
Top dividend yields in Dow 30.

Momentum
Monthly
52-Week High
Proximity to 52-week high (George & Hwang).

Value
Quarterly
Shareholder Yield
Dividend-led yield proxy (buybacks where unavailable).

Blended
Monthly
Value + Momentum
Combined value & momentum score (AQR-style blend).

Quality
Semi-annual
Quality GARP
High ROE, revenue growth, cheap P/E; semi-annual.
HUBB, PWR, ETN, GEV, NEE, MTZ
